articles.title: Twitter CEO Jack Dorsey Rejects Ethereum
articles.description: Twitter CEO Jack Dorsey has continued to reject Ethereum as a viable investment. This comes amidst calls for the billionaire to explore other altcoins besides Bitcoin. Dorsey remains a Bitcoin maximalist as he says that Bitcoin is the most important thing to happen in his lifetime. All this despite the fact that his company Twitter […]

articles.title: Analyst Says Crypto Traders Are Sleeping on One Altcoin As ‘Final Leg’ of Bull Run Approaches
articles.description: Popular trader Credible Crypto thinks one large-cap altcoin that some are counting out could see new all-time highs in the coming months. The pseudonymous analyst tells his 222,000 Twitter followers that Litecoin (LTC) could capitalize on the final “legendary” leg of the current bull run. “Seeing a lot of people saying LTC had its ‘bull […]

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Becomes The Latest Addition To Grayscale Digital Large Cap Fund
articles.description: Grayscale has just added Cardano to its Digital Large Cap Fund. The top asset management firm announced its quarterly rebalancing that brought up Cardano to be the third-largest holdings of the company. Welcome aboard, #Cardano. We have adjusted the portfolio of Grayscale Digital Large Cap Fund to now include $ADA. — Grayscale (@Grayscale) July 2, […]

articles.title: ADA and BCH Maintain Bullish Structures While LTC Breaks Down
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) has bounced at the long-term $1.05 support area, which acted as resistance in Dec. 2017.

articles.title: New Litecoin All Time Highs Are Still In The Cards
articles.description: After a week of trending upwards, Litecoin could finally be poised to rally above the $160 target. The coin traded at or above that number for nearly half the year. articles.title: Ethereum EIP-1559 is fast approaching; Why the hesitation?
articles.description: Ethereum’s EIP-1559 upgrade is fast approaching, with the asset trading just under the $2100-level at press time. Now, Ethereum successfully made a comeback above the $2000-level after recovering from the drop towards the last week of June 2021. This changed the percentage of large wallet investors holding Ethereum, with the same hiking to the 42%-level, […]

articles.title: Grayscale adds significant weighting to Cardano in its large cap fund
articles.description: Investment firm Grayscale has added cardano to its large cap fund, giving it a respectable weighting ahead of bitcoin cash and litecoin.

articles.description: Elon Musk is back at it again

articles.title: San Marino Approves Blockchain ‘Covid Certificates’ on VeChain
articles.description: The San Marino General Council has approved an incentive for a green vaccination pass that uses VeChain technology and non-fungible tokens (NFT).

articles.title: Bitcoin bounces at key range amid hope BTC price will avoid ‘big nuke’
articles.description: A major dip to $20,000 is not expected, one trader says, but lower levels, in general, are still in the cards going into the weekend.

articles.title: Free DOGE? New game touts million Dogecoin up for grabs
articles.description: An augmented reality mobile game titled Million Doge Disco, which will entice players to earn Dogecoin (DOGE) and interactive non-fungible tokens (NFTs) while playing, launches this week.

articles.title: TA: Why Ethereum (ETH) Key Indicators Suggest Fresh Drop Below $2K
articles.description: Ethereum failed to stay above $2,100 and it is now moving lower against the US Dollar. ETH price is likely to continue lower and it could even break $2,000. articles.title: San Marino approves VeChain eNFT vaccination certificate that's verifiable worldwide
articles.description: San Marino has approved VeChain’s eNFT backed vaccination passport, dubbed the San Marino Digital Covid Certificate.

articles.title: TA: Bitcoin Price Reaches Key Support, Why BTC Could Start Fresh Increase
